name: HWM Large-diameter Vertical IoT Water Meter
desc: Large-diameter vertical spiral-wing IoT water meter. DN50~DN200, R200, NB-IoT/4G, IP68, optional valve control.
overview: The HWM Vertical Large-diameter IoT Water Meter is specifically designed for high-flow applications: industrial manufacturing, municipal water supply and urban residential mains. Vertical-axis spiral wing design. Accurate at low flow rates. Suitable for filters with fine and coarse filtration. Optional valve control for remote shut-off. NB-IoT / 4G wireless.

specs.label: Valve control (optional)
specs.value: Integrated electric valve: remote open/close, flow limiting

features: Wide flow adaptability: ideal for applications with large flow variation — maintains high accuracy even at low flow
Very low start-up flow rate for precise metering at minimum consumption
Built-in filter screen handles impurities in the water supply pipeline
Simple vertical inline installation — no front disassembly needed, no special fittings required
Remote reading via NB-IoT / 4G with real-time reporting and threshold alerts
Accuracy: ±5% at low-flow zone / ±2% at high-flow zone per standard
Optional integrated valve control for remote open / close / flow-limit
